title: antidesma neurocarpum var. hosei
intro: Antidesma neurocarpum var. hosei, also known as Hose's Antidesma, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, specifically in Malaysia and the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Antidesma neurocarpum var. hosei include the reduction of inflammation, improvement of wound healing, and the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
